purpose_statement: Installs git hooks by setting core.hooksPath to .githooks/
Pre-commit hook orchestrator — runs structural checks, unit tests, codex validation, and docs-index freshness check before allowing commit
Variant pre-commit hook that blocks file deletions (safety net for content preservation)
Pre-push hook — blocks push if AI stash files present, codex locks stale, or task contract invalid
Manages Mintlify dev server lifecycle for browser tests (start/stop/health-check)
Verifies browser availability for Puppeteer-based integration tests
Pre-commit sub-hook — verifies file-walker is available and runs structural checks on staged files
Fetches latest topics and posts from Livepeer Forum API, writes to snippets/automations/forum/
Fetches blog posts from Ghost CMS API, writes to snippets/automations/blog/
Fetches video data from YouTube Data API, writes to snippets/automations/youtube/
Fetches project showcase data from external source, writes to snippets/automations/showcase/
Developer CLI orchestrator — unified command surface for setup, dev server, testing, hooks, and script execution across all repo domains
YouTube video filter — post-processes fetched YouTube data to filter/sort videos for display
Minimal audit runner — lightweight audit for quick checks during task execution
Python audit utility — runs Python-based audit checks (alternative to Node auditors)
Quick audit launcher — runs audit-orchestrator with default settings for immediate results
Audit test — validates audit pipeline logic and report format
Puppeteer browser integration test — renders pages from docs.json and checks for console errors, load failures, and visual regressions
Audits deployed docs page HTTP status codes (v1, v2, or both) and emits a stable JSON report
Comprehensive OpenAPI spec validation — checks references, schemas, examples. Supports --strict (validate), --fix (repair), and report modes.
Comprehensive V2 MDX link audit — checks internal links, external links, anchor refs. Supports --staged, --full, --strict, --write-links modes.
Self-test suite for v2-link-audit.js — validates audit logic against known fixtures
WCAG accessibility audit for v2 pages — checks heading hierarchy, alt text, ARIA. Supports --fix mode for auto-repair.
Self-test suite for v2-wcag-audit.js — validates WCAG audit logic against known fixtures
Test orchestrator — dispatches all unit test suites. Called by pre-commit hook and npm test.
PR orchestrator — runs changed-file scoped validation checks for pull request CI. Dispatches per-file validators based on PR diff.
Tests codex-commit.js — validates commit message generation and contract compliance
Tests codex-safe-merge-with-stash.js — validates safe merge logic with stash handling
Tests sync-codex-skills.js — validates skill file synchronisation between sources
Tests create-codex-pr.js — validates PR creation logic and branch naming
Validates docs-guide source-of-truth coverage, README pointers, and generated index freshness
Validates docs.json page-entry syntax, reports missing routes, suggests remaps, and optionally applies approved remaps
Tests accuracy verification rules — GitHub vs DeepWiki precedence, freshness, fallback, and cache reuse
Validates MDX internal links and snippet import paths are resolvable
Tests lpd scoped mint-dev functionality — validates dev server scope filtering
Enforces MDX guardrails — globals imports, math delimiters, markdown table line breaks
Validates MDX syntax and structure — checks for parse errors, invalid JSX, broken components
Unit tests for openapi-reference-audit.js — tests individual audit rules and fix logic
Tests OpenAPI rolling issue tracker — validates issue creation and dedup logic
Content quality checks — validates frontmatter completeness, thin content detection, placeholder flagging
Tests repo-audit-orchestrator.js pipeline — validates mode/scope combinations and report output
Enforces script header schema, keeps group script indexes in sync, and builds aggregate script index
Spelling check — validates content against custom dictionary with en-GB rules
Style guide compliance — checks en-GB conventions, heading case, formatting rules
Unit tests for v2-link-audit.js — tests individual link checking rules
Unit tests for v2-wcag-audit.js — tests individual WCAG rules
Tests validate-codex-task-contract.js — validates contract checking logic
File tree walker — recursively finds files matching patterns. Used by pre-commit hook and validators.
MDX parser utility — extracts frontmatter, components, content blocks from MDX files
Mintignore utility — reads .mintignore patterns and filters file lists
OpenAPI rolling issue utility — creates/updates GitHub issues for persistent OpenAPI audit findings
Spell checker utility — checks text against custom dictionary with en-GB locale support
Configuration data — list of internal report page paths for publish-v2-internal-reports.js
Shared utilities for docs-index.json generation — path resolution, frontmatter extraction, index merging
Accuracy verification engine — scores page accuracy against source-weighted 2026 rules
Usefulness scoring engine — computes human and agent usefulness scores from page metadata
Generated file banner template — provides standard banner text for auto-generated files
Lightweight page auditor — quick pass over all pages checking basic frontmatter and structure
Full page auditor — comprehensive check of all pages including content quality metrics
V2-specific page auditor — checks v2/** pages for v2-specific requirements (frontmatter, components)
Component usage auditor — scans pages for component usage patterns and reports statistics
Script auditor — analyses all repo scripts, categorises usage/overlap, generates SCRIPT_AUDIT reports
Tasks folder auditor — checks tasks/ structure, normalises report locations, applies recommendations with conflict-safe moves
Diagnostic — maps v1 page URLs to v2 equivalents for migration tracking
Usefulness auditor — scores v2 MDX pages on human and agent usefulness with source-weighted 2026 accuracy verification
PR enforcer — checks for conflicting codex PRs targeting the same files/branches
Component error checker — scans pages for broken or misconfigured component usage
AI stash enforcer — blocks push if AI temporary/stash files are present in working tree
Quarantine manager — classifies files for quarantine (default) or applies quarantine moves (--apply)
Codex commit helper — audits codex branch state and generates compliant commit messages
Codex merge utility — safely merges branches with stash handling to avoid codex conflicts
Codex lock release utility — releases stale codex lock files
Codex task finaliser — enforces task completion requirements before closing
Codex task preflight — generates task setup files and validates preconditions
Codex lock validator — checks for stale or conflicting lock files before push
RSS-to-MDX converter — imports RSS feed items and converts to MDX page format
Codex PR creator — generates codex PR with correct branch naming, labels, and body template
Cross-agent packager — bundles audit reports and repo state into agent-consumable packages
Mintlify dev debugger — diagnostic tool for troubleshooting mint dev server issues
Callout inserter — adds Note/Tip/Warning callout components to MDX files based on content patterns
Batch OG image updater — updates og:image meta tags across multiple pages
Mint watcher patcher — applies patch to fix Mintlify file watcher issues in dev mode
Mint dev scope generator — creates a scoped docs.json for running mint dev on a subset of pages
OG image replacer — replaces og:image path in a single page frontmatter
Safe SEO generator — generates SEO metadata with dry-run and rollback safety
Test for add-callouts.js — validates callout insertion logic against fixtures
Test for seo-generator — validates SEO generation logic
Bulk OG image updater — updates og:image across all v2 pages
Single OG image updater — updates og:image for one page
Content freshness audit — checks for TODO/TBD/Coming Soon markers, thin pages, stale content
Personal utility — downloads LinkedIn video by URL
Personal utility — downloads LinkedIn video using browser cookies for auth
Generated file banner enforcer — checks (--check) or writes (default) "do not edit" banners on generated files
One-off migration tool — executed phase 1 worktree restructure plan (historical)
Diagnostic — runs final verification checks on page set (manual tool)
Diagnostic — given a broken URL, attempts to find the correct v2 equivalent
AI sitemap generator — produces AI-optimised sitemap files. Dual-mode: --check (enforcer) / --write (generator).
Generates the docs-guide component library index page
Generates docs-guide workflow/template indexes and optionally verifies freshness
Generates the docs-guide pages index
Docs index generator — produces docs-index.json from v2 frontmatter and docs.json. Dual-mode: --check (enforcer) / --write (generator). Most-called script in the repo.
LLMs file generator — produces llms.txt and llms-full.txt for AI consumption. Dual-mode: --check / --write.
Pages index generator — generates and verifies section-style index.mdx files for v2 docs folders plus root aggregate index
Locale docs.json generator — produces localised docs.json variants from route-map and source docs.json
i18n shared utilities — common helper functions for translation pipeline
i18n configuration — language codes, locale paths, translation settings
docs.json localiser engine — transforms docs.json navigation for locale variants
docs route resolver — maps page paths to locale-aware routes
Frontmatter parser/writer — reads and writes MDX frontmatter for translation
MDX parser for i18n — extracts translatable content blocks from MDX
MDX translation engine — applies translations to MDX content blocks
Path utilities for i18n — locale-aware path resolution and mapping
Translation provenance tracker — records source, timestamp, and provider for each translated segment
Mock translation provider — returns placeholder translations for testing without API calls
OpenRouter translation provider — calls OpenRouter API for actual translations
Provider registry — selects translation provider (OpenRouter or mock) based on configuration
Mintlify language toggle checker — validates Mintlify version supports language toggle feature
Tests i18n CLI guardrails — validates argument validation and safety checks
Tests docs-json-localizer — validates locale docs.json transformation logic
Tests frontmatter parser — validates frontmatter read/write roundtrip
Tests MDX translation — validates content block translation logic
Tests provenance tracker — validates translation provenance recording
Tests OpenRouter provider — validates API call logic and response parsing
Translation generator — translates v2 MDX pages to target languages via OpenRouter API
Page inspector — displays parsed metadata, frontmatter, components, and structure for a single page
Video page inspector — displays video-specific metadata and embed configuration for a page
Mintlify dev server launcher — starts mint dev with correct configuration
Script scaffolder — creates a new script file prefilled with the required docs header template

scope: tools/scripts, tools/config, v2/internal, docs.json, tasks/reports, tests/reports
purpose_statement: Report publisher — publishes v2 internal audit reports to configured output locations
Repo audit orchestrator — dispatches all static analysis validators in sequence. Supports --mode (static/full), --scope (full/changed), --quarantine, --agent-pack.
Script footprint auditor — analyses script file sizes, dependencies, and usage patterns across the repo
External docs fetcher — pulls doc fragments from external GitHub repos into snippets/data/ for inclusion in builds
LPT exchange data fetcher — pulls exchange listing data for LPT token pages
OpenAPI spec fetcher — pulls latest OpenAPI specs from Livepeer services for reference pages
API docs generator — generates API reference pages from OpenAPI specs
Glossary generator — produces glossary data file from terminology sources
Terminology search — searches glossary/terminology data for definitions
SEO generator — generates SEO metadata (title, description, keywords) for v2 pages from content analysis
Snippet test runner — runs basic validation on snippet scripts
Component library updater — syncs component library documentation from source
EN-GB style homogeniser — finds and fixes American English spellings, style guide violations, and formatting inconsistencies across v2 content
Codex skills sync — synchronises skill definition files between local and remote sources. Supports --check mode.
Manual browser test runner — opens all pages in Puppeteer for visual inspection
Manual comprehensive test — runs all page validators including slow/network checks
V2 page tester — validates v2 pages via Puppeteer browser rendering
YouTube page tester — validates YouTube embed pages render correctly
Audio transcription tool — transcribes audio files to MDX format for docs content
Codex task contract enforcer — validates branch naming, task files, PR body, and issue state for codex branches
Page verifier — checks all pages in docs.json resolve to valid files
Page verifier — checks a subset of pages resolve to valid files
Payment/orchestrator gate verifier — checks payment and orchestrator documentation gate conditions
Large change verifier — blocks or warns when a commit touches an unusually large number of files
WCAG repair shared logic — common repair functions used by WCAG audit fix mode
